title: 21 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including One Dividend King
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 9.6% and a median increase of 6.25%. I've tracked 118 increases in 2022. There are twenty-one increases for next week, up from eighteen last week.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) Q4 Earnings & Sales Top Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: Genuine Parts' (GPC) Q4 earnings gain from robust sales growth, ongoing gross-margin improvement initiatives and expenses control actions in response to inflationary cost pressure.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 11.18% and 2.75%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Genuine Parts beats estimates and offers upbeat guidance
text: Genuine Parts Company shares GPC, +0.74% rose 1% in premarket trade Thursday, after the car parts maker beat fourth-quarter earnings estimates and offered guidance that was above consensus. Atlanta-based Genuine Parts posted net income of $256.0 million, or $1.79 a share, for the quarter, up from $171.6 million, or $1.18 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Genuine Parts (GPC) Gears Up for Q4 Earnings: Factors at Play
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Genuine Parts' (GPC) Q4 earnings and revenues is pegged at $1.61 and $4.67 billion, respectively.

title: 5 Must-Buy Stocks Ahead of Q4 Earnings Results This Week
text: We have narrowed our search to five stocks that will release fourth-quarter earnings results this week. These are: FUN, MRO, ALSN, GPC and NTR.
